title: Onyx Ore Kit
description: Simple Onyx Ore is a straightforward mod that introduces a new, basic Onyx Ore into the world of Minecraft.
body:
Onyx Ore Kit is a straightforward mod that introduces a new, Strong Onyx Ore into the world of Minecraft.

It currently adds:

The Onyx Ore that spawns in the Overworld.

You haver a complete set of armor, weapons and tools.

This mod is perfect for modpack creators looking for a new, simple mineral for progression, or for players who want a small, vanilla-style addition to their game!
